name: formulon-cell-monorepo
description: Monorepo for @libraz/formulon-cell — a spreadsheet UI library for the formulon WASM calc engine.

scripts.build: yarn workspaces foreach -A --topological-dev --exclude formulon-cell-monorepo --exclude '@formulon-cell/*' run build
scripts.build:all: yarn workspaces foreach -A --topological-dev --exclude formulon-cell-monorepo run build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspaces foreach -A --exclude formulon-cell-monorepo run typecheck
scripts.prepublish:libs: cp LICENSE packages/formulon-cell/ && cp LICENSE packages/formulon-cell-react/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp LICENSE packages/formulon-cell-vue/ 2>/dev/null || true
